offer: For restaurant finance managers processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide daily cash flow summaries instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem: inability to track daily cash flow accurately
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant finance managers
Indie Hackers posts on relevant workflows
DM outreach to restaurant finance managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing finance tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for cash flow data and summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing cash flow data
